name: Operations/ms-import-rebuild-indexes
description: $import index-rebuild-behavior conformance tests (from ImportRebuildIndexesTests.cs). Index rebuild/disable during import is a server-side-only configuration knob with no client-facing request parameter, so this suite only confirms that unrecognized rebuild-related parameters have no effect on the request contract.

test.name: $import does not expose any client-controllable index-rebuild parameter
test.description: Sending unrecognized rebuild-related parameters (rebuildIndexes, sqlIndexRebuildThreads, disableOptionalIndexesForImport) alongside a normal $import body must not change the response: still 400 Bad Request, same as without them.

operation.description: POST $import with unrecognized rebuildIndexes/sqlIndexRebuildThreads/disableOptionalIndexesForImport parameters alongside a normal (unconfigured-host) body

assert.description: Unrecognized index-rebuild parameters must not change the outcome: still 400 Bad Request, same as without them
